name: Shadow Puppeteer
summary: Arrange lights and puppets so their moving shadows satisfy fussy theater contracts.
description: A local projection puzzle with draggable lights and puppet blockers, target silhouettes, gel and focus resources, contract modes, scoring, session-only moonlight unlock, touch and keyboard controls, reduced-motion behavior, optional local audio, and teardown.

config.instructions: Move a light and three puppets to match target shadow marks. Spend gel, focus, shape swaps, and cues to satisfy each theater contract.
prompts: Village fable asks for a readable three-shadow tableau with forgiving target marks.
Storm opera tightens the tolerance and asks for cleaner projection angles.
Moonlit encore unlocks within the session after a strong cue and requires precise shadow spacing.
